title: Ultra Darkmode
description: Transform your interface with a sleek, ultra-dark and modern look!
body:
# Ultra Darkmode | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ultra-darkmode)
Ultra Darkmode reimagines Minecraft’s interface with a rich, polished dark aesthetic. It softens harsh brightness, enhances visibility through balanced contrast, and delivers a smooth, eye-friendly UI ideal for long play sessions. Designed for players who enjoy a refined and minimalist style, this pack gives your menus a darker immersive atmosphere with a clean modern-premium feel. It also offers compatibility with popular mods like Voice Chat, Mod Menu, and many others.

## Ultra Darkmode 1.0.0 - Special Pack | 1.19.2
_It won't be updated_. **Supports all mods below:**
- Ad Astra
- Alex's Mobs
- Apotheosis
- Aquaculture
- Armor Statues
- Avaritia
- Botania
